name: hDNAgr hematopoietic stem-cell aging registry
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov not-yet-recruiting randomized blinded placebo-controlled aging registry of hDNAgr therapy in adults aged 45 to 65, with safety, telomere, blood-count, CD34-positive progenitor, biological-age, SF-36, and inflammatory endpoints and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
